name: !AnyWay!
short_description: Do you like parkour? Dashing retro times? AnyWay! Try yourself on an unsuccessful journey in the role of Joy, feel the burden of parkour! A small, but exciting adventure Joy will not make you relax, not for you, not for your friends!
detailed_description:
Steam Trading Cards!

You can get Steam Trading Cards right now!


About the Game

Let's Return to Our Past!

An unusual world for an unusual person. Attempts of scientists to recreate the time machine lost after unsuccessful tests turned into a failure! The protagonist Joy, got into the times of retro vision!
  • 5000 achievements
  • Hard parkour
  • More than 10 hard levels
  • A few secrets
  • Two free characters and four paid
  • The game is translated into 8 languages
So why do not you come and experience the torment of Joy?
